steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content: Divide coefficients and subtract exponents: $$\frac{6v^{12}}{18v^{3}}=\frac{6}{18}\cdot v^{12-3}=\frac{v^{9}}{3}.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above confirms B, $\frac{v^{9}}{3}$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so B is correct.
